choices.name: Yes
choices.choiceText: ﻿Yes I would like to submit preferred candidates

fields.name: Workers_Required
fields.helpText: How many workers you require for each day of the week

validationRule.errorMessage: This value must be greater than 0 and less than 1000

fields.name: Do_you_have_preferred_workers
fields.fieldText: Do you have any previous workers who you would prefer to be assigned to this booking?

fields.name: Additonal_Notes
fields.helpText: Any additional notes that where missing from the previous screen can be added here, these notes will be seen by Blue Arrow before the booking is confirmed

fields.name: Displaytext01_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
New Booking


ERROR!

fields.name: Error_Text
fields.fieldText: You do not have any Sites enabled for VMS bookings, please contact Blue Arrow to enable the creation of bookings for your Sites.

fields.name: Job_Role_Error
fields.fieldText: You do not have any Job Roles enabled for VMS bookings, please contact Blue Arrow to enable the creation of bookings for your Job Roles.

fields.name: Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
Preferred Workers


Viewing history of previous workers for the details:


﻿Site Name: {!Site_Loop.Name}

Job Role: {!Job_Role_Loop.Name}


﻿There are no preferred candidates available for this site and job role.

fields.name: Displaytext01_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Preferred Workers


Optionally please number workers based on strongest preference (1 being highest preference) or skip by pressing Next

fields.name: Displaytext01_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Preferred Workers


Viewing history of previous workers for the details:


﻿Site Name: {!Site_Loop.Name}

Job Role: {!Job_Role_Loop.Name}


Please choose preferred candidates below:

fields.name: Start_Date
fields.helpText: Shifts will be created from this date, this does not have to match the days of the week set below. For example if the First Working Day is a Wednesday shifts will be created from this day in line with the days submitted below

validationRule.errorMessage: Start Date must be before End Date!

fields.name: End_Date
fields.helpText: Shifts will be created up until this date, this does not have to match the days of the week set below. For example if the Last Working Day is a Thursday shifts will be created up until this day in line with the days submitted below

validationRule.errorMessage: End Date must be equal to or after Start Date!

fields.name: My_start_and_end_times_can_be_different_day_by_day
fields.fieldText: My Shift start and end times can be different day by day
fields.helpText: Make sure to tick this box if you have different start and end times for each day of the week

fields.name: Time_Missing_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time and End time must be populated!

fields.name: No_Day_Error
fields.fieldText: You must choose at least 1 working day!

fields.name: Monday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Tuesday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Wednesday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Thursday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Friday_Text
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Saturday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Sunday_Error
fields.fieldText: Start time or End time must be populated!

fields.name: Displaytext01_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Thank you for your booking


Details of the booking are listed below:


﻿Name: {!Job_Order_Name}

﻿Site Name: {!Site_Loop.Name}

Job Role: {!Job_Role_Loop.Name}

Required Staff: {!Workers_Required}

First Working Day: {!Start_Date}

Last Working Day: {!End_Date}
